languages.text: "А коры жареной не хочешь? Пока мы в осаде, деликатесов не ждите".

traits.locale_text: "А коры жареной не хочешь? Пока мы в осаде, деликатесов не ждите".

languages.text: "Perhaps you'd prefer fried tree bark? We're under siege, so don't expect fine dining for a while."
languages.original_text: "А коры жареной не хочешь? Пока мы в осаде, деликатесов не ждите".

traits.locale_text: "Perhaps you'd prefer fried tree bark? We're under siege, so don't expect fine dining for a while."
"Perhaps you'd prefer fried tree bark? We're under siege, so don't expect fine dining for a while."
"Perhaps you'd prefer fried tree bark? We're under siege, so don't expect fine dining for a while."
"Perhaps you'd prefer fried tree bark? We're under siege, so don't expect fine dining for a while."

languages.text: “要不给你换成炸树皮？咱正被围着呢，这段时间就别想吃什么好东西了。”
languages.original_text: "Perhaps you'd prefer fried tree bark? We're under siege, so don't expect fine dining for a while."

traits.locale_text: “要不给你换成炸树皮？咱正被围着呢，这段时间就别想吃什么好东西了。”

languages.text: «¿Qué, prefieres corteza de árbol frita? Estamos bajo asedio; no esperes buena comida en un tiempo».
languages.original_text: "Perhaps you'd prefer fried tree bark? We're under siege, so don't expect fine dining for a while."

traits.locale_text: «¿Qué, prefieres corteza de árbol frita? Estamos bajo asedio; no esperes buena comida en un tiempo».

languages.text: « Tu préférerais peut-être de l'écorce frite ? On est assiégés. Les festins, ça attendra. »
languages.original_text: "Perhaps you'd prefer fried tree bark? We're under siege, so don't expect fine dining for a while."

traits.locale_text: « Tu préférerais peut-être de l'écorce frite ? On est assiégés. Les festins, ça attendra. »

languages.text: "Belki de kızarmış ağaç kabuğu tercih edersin... Kuşatma altındayız, bu yüzden bir süre iyi yemek bekleme."
languages.original_text: "Perhaps you'd prefer fried tree bark? We're under siege, so don't expect fine dining for a while."

traits.locale_text: "Belki de kızarmış ağaç kabuğu tercih edersin... Kuşatma altındayız, bu yüzden bir süre iyi yemek bekleme."

languages.text: "Wäre dir gebratene Rinde lieber? Wir werden belagert, also vergiss anständiges Essen fürs Erste."
languages.original_text: "Perhaps you'd prefer fried tree bark? We're under siege, so don't expect fine dining for a while."

traits.locale_text: "Wäre dir gebratene Rinde lieber? Wir werden belagert, also vergiss anständiges Essen fürs Erste."

languages.text: 「それなら、揚げた木の皮のほうがお好みかい？ こっちは包囲されてんだ、しばらくは上等な食事なんて期待するな」
languages.original_text: "Perhaps you'd prefer fried tree bark? We're under siege, so don't expect fine dining for a while."

traits.locale_text: 「それなら、揚げた木の皮のほうがお好みかい？ こっちは包囲されてんだ、しばらくは上等な食事なんて期待するな」
